case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA: $2,210 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RAYMOND FONG REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE (CLAIMANT TOMMY BRIGGS) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR TOMMY BRIGGS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,210.00 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
